name: privacy-identity-xray
description: Privacy & Identity: The X-Ray Protocol Era - A decentralized identity management system

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd smart-contracts && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.deploy:contracts: cd smart-contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.start:dev: concurrently "npm run dev:contracts" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"

author: X-Ray Protocol Team
